/usr/bin/c++  -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  -L/opt/homebrew/opt/libomp/lib -lomp "CMakeFiles/ckks-appro.dir/ckks-appro.cpp.o" -o ckks-appro  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEpke.1.4.2.dylib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEbinfhe.1.4.2.dylib /usr/local/lib/libOPENFHEcore.1.4.2.dylib -Xpreprocessor -fopenmp -lomp -Wno-unused-command-line-argument
